import { Table, RowData } from '../types' import { getMemoOptions, memo } from '../utils' export function getFacetedUniqueValues<TData extends RowData>(): ( table: Table<TData>, columnId: string ) => () => Map<any, number> { return (table, columnId) => memo( () => [table.getColumn(columnId)?.getFacetedRowModel()], facetedRowModel => { if (!facetedRowModel) return new Map() let facetedUniqueValues = new Map<any, number>() for (let i = 0; i < facetedRowModel.flatRows.length; i++) { const values = facetedRowModel.flatRows[i]!.getUniqueValues<number>(columnId) for (let j = 0; j < values.length; j++) { const value = values[j]! if (facetedUniqueValues.has(value)) { facetedUniqueValues.set( value, (facetedUniqueValues.get(value) ?? 0) + 1 ) } else { facetedUniqueValues.set(value, 1) } } } return facetedUniqueValues }, getMemoOptions( table.options, 'debugTable', `getFacetedUniqueValues_${columnId}` ) ) }
